hero.title: AHA CLASSICAL YIHURIRA NA GOSPEL
hero.subtitle: Ikigo Kimwe Cyo Gusoma. Umuziki Wose.

mission.title: Umuziki n'Ibyo Kwiga ku Bantu
mission.description: Igikorwa gifatanyije guteza imbere umuziki hamwe n'ibitabo by'uburezi, bikora ibikorwa by'ubugeni bishingira, bigisha, no guhindura sosiyete kubufatanye n'ubutumwa bwo kurera, bwo kurinda imico, n'ubw'umwuka.

features.educationalMusicDesc: Indirimbo zifite ubutumwa bwo kurera, bwo kurinda imico, n'ubw'umwuka mu iterambere rusange.
features.formativeLiteratureDesc: Ibitabo by'ubwenge n'uburezi by'ubufatanye bikigisha kubona inzira mu nibogamiye.
features.culturalEventsDesc: Ibirori byo kuririmba, amahugurwa, n'ibirori by'imico bikungahaza imyidagaduro n'uburezi.
features.musicEducationDesc: Gahunda z'amahugurwa n'amashuri y'abana, urubyiruko, n'abakuru mu guteza imbere impano yo kuririmba.

mission.visionDesc: Kuba ikigo cy'ubugeni n'ubwenge gikora ibikorwa bitanga umusanzu mu iterambere ry'imico, imico, n'uburezi bwa sosiyete mu guhuza umuziki n'ubwenge mu cyerekezo kimwe gikora ibyiza.

footer.copyright: © 2024 UNA TANTUM VOCE. Uburenganzira bwose bwafatiwe. | Iterambere ry'Umuziki ku Bose

contact.title: Twandikire
contact.subtitle: Twifurije kuva i kure. Niba ufite ibibazo bijyanye numuziki, ushaka gukorana, cyangwa ukeneye ubufasha, turi hano kugufasha.
contact.name: Izina
contact.subject: Ingingo
contact.supportDesc: Itsinda ryacu ry'ubufasha riri hano 24/7 kugufasha mu bibazo waba ufitse. Ntugire ubwoba kutwandikira!

empty.title: Isomero Ryawe Ni Ihame
empty.description: Tangira gusanga umusaruro wacu w'indirimbo zo muri Classical na Gospel, ibitabo, nibindi byinshi kugirango ubeho isomero ryawe.
